title: AI Knowledge Graph Engineer (Backend, ML, AWS)
description: AI-powered knowledge graph platform. Transform unstructured documents into structured, queryable intelligence. Own development of: batch document ingestion, text parsing/normalization, multi-pass LLM extraction pipelines (entities, events, relationships), normalization/resolution to ontology-aligned objects, human-in-the-loop review, LLM finetuning, knowledge graph construction (AWS Neptune / Neo4j), backend services and APIs. Tech: Python (Pydantic), Neo4j or Neptune, AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock), web scraping (Crawl4Ai, Scrapling).
screening_questions: Describe your experience building knowledge graphs and ontology-driven data systems.
What graph databases have you used (Neptune, Neo4j, others)?
Describe a multi-pass LLM extraction pipeline you have built.
How would you design a human-in-the-loop review workflow for ML extraction?
What is your experience deploying AI/ML workloads on AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock)?
full_description: AI-powered knowledge graph platform. Transform unstructured documents into structured, queryable intelligence. Own development of: batch document ingestion, text parsing/normalization, multi-pass LLM extraction pipelines (entities, events, relationships), normalization/resolution to ontology-aligned objects, human-in-the-loop review, LLM finetuning, knowledge graph construction (AWS Neptune / Neo4j), backend services and APIs. Tech: Python (Pydantic), Neo4j or Neptune, AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock), web scraping (Crawl4Ai, Scrapling).
